rationale: Educ. Code §13.001 merely defines 'membership' as enrolled student count. It has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal, so no conflict arises.
quote: In this chapter, "membership" means the number of students enrolled in a school district as of a given date.
_note: Rule is a standalone definitional provision with no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
